data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for explicit separation from non-enrolled business flows.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of explicit separation from non-enrolled business flows. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or records indicating that such separation exists or is enforced. The absence of concrete API reads or persisted state checks related to this requirement leads to the conclusion that the validation cannot be completed at this time.
gaps: No evidence of explicit separation from non-enrolled business flows.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for separation from non-enrolled flows
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the requirement for separation from non-enrolled business flows.
